section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports a tick bite around their knee.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A prior tick bite is part of the patient's reported history and symptoms, not an observed current finding or test result.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a history of hunting.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is social/exposure history reported by the patient; while it informs the assessment, it is not itself an assessment or diagnostic impression.
